nasb.text: Eshton became the father of Beth-rapha and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.

esv.text: Eshton fathered Beth-rapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.

cnv.text: 伊施屯生伯拉巴、巴西亞和珥拿轄的父親提欣拿；這些都是利迦人。

ccb.text: 伊施屯生伯拉巴、巴西亚和提欣拿，提欣拿是珥拿辖的父亲。这些都是利迦人。
